query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: Abstract horizontal streaks of color in warm and cool tones, including peach, blue, orange, and white, with overlapping linear patterns resembling venetian blind slats visible in the center-left portion.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred abstract image with aggressive horizontal streaking in clashing warm and cool colors including peach, blue, orange, and white, with faint venetian blind slats barely visible through the intentional blur, creating an unrecognizable photograph where color and gesture completely override representational content.
